suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit convention: all four canonical judgment states (值得跟, 观察中, 短热噪音, 需要补证据) must be displayed together in any judgment summary surface. The homepage Module 02 (今日判断) currently omits 观察中, which now represents 3 of 9 directions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: dashboard/index.html lines 47-60 render only 3 of 4 judgment states. AGENTS.md lists all 4 states under color-coded judgment states but doesn't mandate their joint display in summaries.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the 'Mock data values' section to include all 9 direction names now established in the v2 data file: 18K 金镶翡翠, 多巴胺色系耳饰, 沉香 + 翡翠叠戴, 冰感小件吊坠, 满绿翡翠古法金搭配, 蓝水翡翠简约设计, 翡翠珍珠混搭, 翡翠戒面改制耳钉, 墨翠雕刻件. This prevents future workers from inventing conflicting direction names.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md 'Mock data values' section lists only 4 direction names. dashboard/data/jade_dashboard.json now contains 9 directions after v2-showcase-core-upgrade.
